company.name: Strategic Popoltastic
company.tagline: Read the market. Find your edge.
company.description: Strategic Popoltastic delivers Bain/BCG-grade strategy audits, market positioning, and strategic roadmaps for Dutch mid-market and growth companies. We combine rigorous analytical frameworks with a direct, co-creative working style that cuts through corporate fog.

services.name: Strategy Audit
services.description: Comprehensive assessment of current strategic position — market dynamics, competitive landscape, internal capabilities, and growth vectors. Delivered as a board-ready report with clear recommendations.

services.name: Market Positioning
services.description: Define and validate market position — target segments, value proposition, competitive differentiation, and go-to-market strategy for Dutch mid-market companies.

services.name: Strategic Roadmap
services.description: Translate strategy into execution — phased roadmaps with milestones, resource requirements, risk mitigation, and governance frameworks.

models.name: Project-based
models.description: Fixed-fee engagement based on defined scope and deliverables.

models.name: Retainer
models.description: Monthly retainer for ongoing strategic counsel and quarterly roadmap reviews.

standardTerms.ip: All deliverables become client property upon final payment. Pre-existing methodologies and frameworks remain with Strategic Popoltastic under perpetual license to client.
standardTerms.confidentiality: Both parties agree to maintain strict confidentiality of all proprietary information for 3 years following engagement completion.
standardTerms.liability: Total liability capped at 2x the engagement fee. Excludes consequential, indirect, or punitive damages.
standardTerms.termination: Either party may terminate with 14 days written notice. Client pays for work completed to date.
